creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
The following is from a fairly recent 6-STABLE machine.  Apparently it
is still causing gcc to segfault:

===>  Building for spamdyke-4.0.10
cc -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe  -c spamdyke.c
cc -E -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe  configuration.c | cc -O2
-fno-strict-aliasing -pipe  -x c -c -o configuration.o -
configuration.c: In function `prepare_settings':
configuration.c:2466: internal compiler error: Segmentation fault: 11
Please submit a full bug report,
with preprocessed source if appropriate.
See <URL:http://gcc.gnu.org/bugs.html> for instructions.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /work/a/ports/mail/spamdyke/work/spamdyke-4.0.10/spamdyke.
*** Error code 1

Once it passes the other tests I'll go ahead and commit this leaving the
OSVERSION check in place.

-- WXS
